7 years of Queer Asian Cabaret 🍑🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️
⬇️ Shows & Tickets ⬇️

notable_users.fullname: L U X O   L A S H E S
ɴ ɪ ꜱ ʜ ᴀ    ᴀ ᴀ ʟ ɪ ʏ ᴀ

post_data.caption: On July 24th we’re inviting you to East & Southeast Asian Pride UK in London @asianprideuk! Join us in celebrating East & Southeast Asian LGBTQIA+ communities at @_electrowerkz. For the first time ever, Carlos Gu, @bittenpeachuk (Queer Asian Cabaret), and @kakilangarts (ESEA Arts Charity) are teaming up to bring you an unforgettable night. Expect drag, cabaret, live music, and special performances from our hosts! The night will begin with a market fair, followed by a cabaret show, which will descend into a club night. Bring your friends, family, and allies down to celebrate all things Queer and Asian! Tickets are available now 🎟️ #asianprideuk

The Bitten Peach Family Portrait 2026 (1/3)

Ride into the Year of the Horse with The Bitten Peach! 🎠
This Lunar New Year season, we have 3 cabaret shows, 4 workshops and the return of our Peach Fuzz development course! You can find info and ticket links for all of them on our website! www.thebittenpeach.com

Photos by @capturedbycorinne at @hotdogstudios
Edit by @louisemccormack_holland
Styling by ⁨@mahatmakhandi⁩

#chinesenewyear #lunarnewyear #yearofthehorse #gaysian #gaylondon

The Bitten Peach Family Portrait 2026 (3/3)

Ride into the Year of the Horse with The Bitten Peach! 🎠
This Lunar New Year season, we have 3 cabaret shows, 4 workshops and the return of our Peach Fuzz development course! You can find info and ticket links for all of them on  our website! www.thebittenpeach.com

See you at @cambridgepride on Sat June 13th! We’re performing on the main stage from 17:45-18:45. 🏳️‍🌈🏳️‍⚧️ #pride

The Bitten Peach cabaret stars are bringing you a KPop Cabaret Showdown! 🤩💖

Come dressed in your best KPop idol fashion for an afternoon of your favourite KPop songs, drag and dance numbers. 🌴

The Bitten Peach is the UK’s premiere Queer Asian Cabaret Company. Founded in 2019, The Bitten Peach have taken their variety shows all across the UK, entertaining audiences with their tongue-in-cheek style and dizzying blend of cabaret forms. 🎪

JUNE 12th PEACH VARIETY CABARET AT @thedivineldn  hosted by @shayshayshow 💕 We’ve got a fresh showcase of amazing peaches who are showing off new acts and performances. Come down for a night of peachy cabaret 🍑 Early bird tix out now! #londoncabaret

Ghibli Cabaret - This Sat 23 May @thedivineldn 
After a sold out show on Monday, there are a few tickets left for this Saturday’s show! Do not miss this magic cabaret extravaganza. 

Photos by @yilinwong

🪩 Your weekend plans just got even better! Did you know that @walesmillenniumcentre has its own Cabaret Club?! 👀✨ 

@cabaret_caerdydd is the place to be!! This funky little venue in Cardiff Bay hosts a variety of different shows including comedy acts, burlesque and drag extravaganzas 😍 They have a fully stocked bar, outdoor seating and the venue is very intimate meaning you feel up close to all the action. This has fast become my new favourite spot 🤣

Last night we went to watch @bittenpeachuk - the UK’s premier queer cabaret group 🍑 I cannot recommend this show enough if you get chance to watch them! It was hilarious, sensual, emotional and fun all wrapped up into one performance 👏🏽 We absolutely LOVED it and honestly did not stop laughing and smiling all night. 

There are plenty of shows coming up online and ticket prices are so reasonable! It’s a perfect spot for a girls night out or date night and you will be supporting up and coming artists from all communities 💖

AD/INVITE @wcs.agency

MAY 8TH @brightonfringe CABARET & BURLESQUE at @spiegelgardens! Book your tickets now 🎟️ #brightonfringe #queerasiancabaret #cabaret

May 25: Kpop Cabaret Showdown, Family & Kids show! Head down to @spiegelgardens @brightonfringe for a KPop cabaret show featuring dance performances, live music, kids games, and a whole lot of fun! This is an all ages, audience interactive show. Book your tickets now 💕 #brightonfringe #kpopcabaret
